languages.text: "Это был "Гимн Потерянных", песня старых Призывов. В ней — ответ, почему мы тут, для чего мы тут. Ей мы поминаем павших и предостерегаем живущих. Ну а гробница... Это местная страшная байка".

traits.locale_text: {n}Суровое лицо Иждрига слегка разглаживается.{/n} "Это был "Гимн Потерянных", песня старых Призывов. В ней — ответ, почему мы тут, для чего мы тут. Ей мы поминаем павших и предостерегаем живущих. Ну а гробница... Это про вашего предка, наследни{mf|к|ца}".

languages.text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."
languages.original_text: "Это был "Гимн Потерянных", песня старых Призывов. В ней — ответ, почему мы тут, для чего мы тут. Ей мы поминаем павших и предостерегаем живущих. Ну а гробница... Это местная страшная байка".

traits.locale_text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And the tomb... that's just a local scary story."

"It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."
"It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups, reminding us why we're here. In both good ways and bad."

"It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And the tomb... that's just a local scary story."

"It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."

languages.text: « C'était l'Hymne des égarés, le chant des anciens Mobilisés. Il nous rappelle les raisons de notre présence ici et notre destinée. C'est ainsi que nous honorons la mémoire des défunts et que nous mettons en garde les vivants. Quant à la tombe... ma foi, ce n'est qu'une histoire d'horreur locale. »
languages.original_text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."

traits.locale_text: « C'était l'Hymne des égarés, le chant des anciens Mobilisés. Il nous rappelle les raisons de notre présence ici et notre destinée. C'est ainsi que nous honorons la mémoire des défunts et que nous mettons en garde les vivants. Quant à la tombe... ma foi, ce n'est qu'une histoire d'horreur locale. »

languages.text: «Era el "Himno de los Perdidos", la canción de los antiguos llamados. Nos recuerda por qué estamos aquí y cuál es nuestro destino. Así rememoramos a los caídos y advertimos a los que aún viven. En cuanto a la tumba... no es más que una leyenda siniestra».
languages.original_text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."

traits.locale_text: «Era el "Himno de los Perdidos", la canción de los antiguos llamados. Nos recuerda por qué estamos aquí y cuál es nuestro destino. Así rememoramos a los caídos y advertimos a los que aún viven. En cuanto a la tumba... no es más que una leyenda siniestra».

languages.text: “那是《迷失者赞歌》，老一辈征召者的曲子。它解释了我们为何在此，又为何而生。我们用它来纪念逝者，警示生者。至于那座陵墓……那不过是当地的一个恐怖故事罢了。”
languages.original_text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."

traits.locale_text: “那是《迷失者赞歌》，老一辈征召者的曲子。它解释了我们为何在此，又为何而生。我们用它来纪念逝者，警示生者。至于那座陵墓……那不过是当地的一个恐怖故事罢了。”

languages.text: "Das war die 'Hymne der Verlorenen', das Lied der alten Einberufenen. Sie ist die Antwort auf die Frage, warum wir hier sind und wozu wir bestimmt sind. So gedenken wir der Gefallenen und warnen die Lebenden. Und was das Grab angeht ... tja, das ist nur eine örtliche Gespenstergeschichte."
languages.original_text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."

traits.locale_text: "Das war die 'Hymne der Verlorenen', das Lied der alten Einberufenen. Sie ist die Antwort auf die Frage, warum wir hier sind und wozu wir bestimmt sind. So gedenken wir der Gefallenen und warnen die Lebenden. Und was das Grab angeht ... tja, das ist nur eine örtliche Gespenstergeschichte."

languages.text: "Eski Sevk Gruplarının şarkısı olan 'Kayıpların İlahisi'. Neden burada olduğumuzun ve niçin var olduğumuzun cevabını barındırır. Yitenleri de böyle hatırlar ve yaşayanları böyle uyarırız. Mezara gelince... Yerel bir korku hikâyesinden ibaret."
languages.original_text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."

traits.locale_text: "Eski Sevk Gruplarının şarkısı olan 'Kayıpların İlahisi'. Neden burada olduğumuzun ve niçin var olduğumuzun cevabını barındırır. Yitenleri de böyle hatırlar ve yaşayanları böyle uyarırız. Mezara gelince... Yerel bir korku hikâyesinden ibaret."

languages.text: 「あれは『失われた聖歌』、いにしえの召集兵たちの歌だ。我々がなぜここにいるのか、何のために定められているのか――その答えがそこにある。あれは、斃れた者を悼み、生きる者に警告を与えるための歌なのだ。そして、あの墓所についてだが…まあ、あれはただの土地の怪談にすぎん。」
languages.original_text: "It was 'Hymn of the Lost,' the song of the old Call-Ups. It holds the answer to why we're here and what we're meant for. It's how we remember the fallen and warn the living. And as for the tomb... well, that's just a local horror story."

traits.locale_text: 「あれは『失われた聖歌』、いにしえの召集兵たちの歌だ。我々がなぜここにいるのか、何のために定められているのか――その答えがそこにある。あれは、斃れた者を悼み、生きる者に警告を与えるための歌なのだ。そして、あの墓所についてだが…まあ、あれはただの土地の怪談にすぎん。」
